expectations.text: Identifies Microservices and Service-Based as the top 2 candidates
expectations.evidence: Microservices 15/15 and Service-Based 14/15 are top 2. Event-Driven third at 13/15.

expectations.text: Shows a ranked table with fit scores for all 8 architecture styles
expectations.evidence: Full ranked table with all 8 styles, star ratings, fit scores, and cost.

expectations.text: Acknowledges close scores and discusses qualifying context
expectations.evidence: Explicitly states 'Scores are close between Microservices (15/15) and Service-Based (14/15)' and lists qualifying questions.

expectations.text: Considers team structure as a factor
expectations.evidence: Discusses 3 teams of 4-6 devs mapping to domain services. Notes 3 teams map naturally to 4-6 coarse services.
Detailed 4-phase evolution: Strangler Fig → Stabilize → Selective extraction → Event-driven augmentation.

expectations.text: Updates architecture.md with Selected Architecture Style section
expectations.evidence: architecture.md has full Selected Architecture Style with rationale, tradeoffs, and 4-phase evolution path.
